executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Architecture-owned gates are green; remaining red is fully externalized to the marketing owner loop.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: External marketing owner loop must produce fresh measurable outcome evidence before whole-stack certification can pass.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus live artifact cross-checks

findings.title: Marketing remains externally red on outcome evidence
findings.mechanism: Marketing independent verification still fails closed (verdict=fail) because primary-repo adoption is measurement-pending with flat Codeberg/GitHub/PyPI movement across the recent window.
findings.root_cause: Codeberg primary-repo adoption has zero star/watch/fork delta across the measurement window; marketing workflow audit confirms bottleneck=distribution_and_message_to_primary_repo_conversion with repair_window_status=measurement_pending.
findings.recommended_fix: Let the marketing owner loop produce fresh measurable outcome evidence, then rerun marketing independent verification before calling the whole stack green.

findings.title: blocked-channel-recovery entered error state (timeout), externally classified
findings.mechanism: Direct live cron inspection shows blocked-channel-recovery (0b14ccb6) in error state with lastRunStatus=error, lastStatus=error, consecErrors=1, lastError='cron: job execution timed out'. This is a change from the prior run where it was last-run-ok. Still externally classified — not an architecture runtime defect.
findings.root_cause: Unblocker channel recovery timed out during its last execution window. The cron scheduler correctly marks it as error and will retry on the next schedule (Tue/Thu 10:30).
findings.recommended_fix: Let blocked-channel-recovery run its next scheduled cycle. Architecture side needs no action.

findings.title: Architecture verifier path is green on ownership gates
findings.mechanism: Loop integrity is green (ralph-docs-watchdog=ok, agent-architecture-watchdog=ok). Verifier source is parseable (316 lines). Independent verify returns ok=true, qualified_pass=true. Health monitor issues are externally classified (blocked-channel-recovery timeout+escalation, marketing staleness).
findings.root_cause: Architecture-side gates are healthy; all architecture-owned checks pass.
findings.recommended_fix: Rerun independent verification after each material architecture artifact refresh.

findings.title: Health monitor records 3 issues, all externally classified
findings.mechanism: blocked-channel-recovery:timeout (error state, 1 consecError), blocked-channel-recovery:escalation (external), marketing_independent_verification:stale_artifact (external). Zero architecture-owned health monitor issues.
findings.root_cause: External domain issues logged correctly; no architecture runtime defects.
findings.recommended_fix: Monitor for recurrence but no architecture action required.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Get a fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Marketing blocks whole-stack certification even though architecture-owned gates are coherent.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Either clears the remaining adoption blocker or preserves truthful fail-closed outcome ownership.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Keep architecture live-topology verification tied to openclaw cron list --json on every watchdog run
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Current live inspection is clean (26/26 enabled, 0 disabled). blocked-channel-recovery error is externally classified.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Stops stale topology claims from reappearing in architecture reports.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Refreshed against current live view: 26 jobs, 26 enabled, 0 disabled. Key delta: blocked-channel-recovery entered error state (timeout, consecErrors=1) since prior run — externally classified. 4 jobs currently running (system-health-monitor, mirror-sync, competitor-analysis, self).

Confirmed architecture-owned runtime gates are all green. Verifier 316 lines, ok=true, 0 errors. Independent verify ok=true, qualified_pass=true. All remaining red is external marketing or blocked-channel-recovery timeout.
Reconfirmed code-backed marketing consumers still expose machine-verifiable shared market-intelligence consumption (reddit_monitor.py, run.py, distribution_lane_executor.py all present on disk).
Docs verifier reports independently verified pass with 115 consecutive passes.

independent_verification.summary: Fresh independent verification chain completed: verifier ok=true, 0 errors. All remaining blockers are external (marketing fail, blocked-channel-recovery timeout).
independent_verification.previous_artifact_summary: Independent verification confirms the repaired architecture verifier now fails closed on stale signoff, the live loop topology/ownership checks remain green, and shared market-intelligence reuse stays machine-verifiable.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Marketing remains red on Codeberg-primary outcome evidence
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: Architecture-owned runtime checks are coherent, but marketing independent verification still fails closed because primary-repo movement is still measurement-pending.

notes: Architecture green means architecture-owned gates are coherent; it does not mean whole-stack certification is green.
